label_content.header_line:
DRAFT — NOT FOR FIELD USE
DANGER: ARC FLASH AND SHOCK HAZARD
label_content.ppe_clothing_description: AR suit + AR hood (ATPV ≥25 cal/cm²); AR gloves; hard hat; safety glasses; balaclava if hood doesn't include face cover.
label_content.engineer: Dr. Maria Schneider, Dr.rer.nat. — License DE-2026-5847

rendering.svg_content: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="100mm" height="75mm" viewBox="0 0 100 75"><title>Arc-Flash Label per ISO 7010 - MSB-1</title><rect x="0" y="0" width="100" height="12" fill="#E00034" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.5"/><text x="50" y="8" font-family="Arial" font-size="5" font-weight="bold" fill="#FFFFFF" text-anchor="middle">DANGER</text><g transform="translate(2, 14)"><polygon points="10,2 18,16 2,16" fill="#FFD600" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.8"/><path d="M 8 5 L 12 9 L 9 9 L 13 14 L 9 11 L 11 11 L 8 6 Z" fill="#000000"/></g><text x="22" y="18" font-family="Arial" font-size="3" font-weight="bold" fill="#000000">Arc Flash and Shock Hazard</text><text x="22" y="22" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Equipment: MSB-1 | 11 kV</text><text x="22" y="26" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Incident Energy: 18.5 cal/cm²</text><text x="22" y="30" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" fill="#000000">Arc Flash Boundary: 2100 mm</text><text x="22" y="42" font-family="Arial" font-size="2.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#000000">PPE Category 3</text><text x="22" y="47" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.8" fill="#000000">AR suit + AR hood (ATPV ≥25 cal/cm²); AR gloves; hard hat; safety glasses; balaclava if hood doesn't include face cover.</text><line x1="0" y1="58" x2="100" y2="58" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.3"/><text x="2" y="62" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.6" fill="#000000">ISO 7010:2019 | 2026-05-17</text><text x="2" y="65" font-family="Arial" font-size="1.4" fill="#000000">Europower Systems AG</text><g transform="translate(80, 58)"><rect x="0" y="0" width="12" height="12" fill="#FFFFFF" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.3"/><text x="6" y="8" font-family="monospace" font-size="2" fill="#000000" text-anchor="middle">QR</text></g></svg>

label_content.header_line:
DRAFT — NOT FOR FIELD USE
RESTRICTED: DO NOT OPERATE — ENERGIZED WORK PROHIBITED
label_content.ppe_clothing_description: Energized work PROHIBITED. No personnel approach permitted without de-energisation + lockout/tagout + grounding. Administrative controls + equipment guarding mandatory.
label_content.engineer: Dr. Maria Schneider, Dr.rer.nat. — License DE-2026-5847

provenance.provenance_note: Upstream arc-flash calc used Lee 1982 fallback because IEEE 1584-2018 600V coefficients were null at time of computation (pending Sprint A.3 transcription). Re-run after IEEE coefficients are verified before any field use.

assumptions: arc-flash intent consumed; per-equipment label data sourced from intl-11kv-substation intent
tool_call_pending_for_pdf_png: true on all labels — calc.render_label contract shipped but runtime tool not yet implemented
MV-SWB: IE 47.2 cal/cm² > 40 cal/cm² → RESTRICTED override auto-applied regardless of jurisdiction
RESTRICTED label advises de-energisation + LOTO + grounding; energized work on this equipment is not permitted

rationale.chat_summary: INT 11kV/400V substation. 3 nodes require labels: 2 standard (MSB-1 DANGER Cat 3, DB-L1 DANGER Cat 3 in ISO-7010 format) + 1 RESTRICTED (MV-SWB IE 47.2 cal/cm² > 40 cal/cm² threshold). RESTRICTED override auto-selected for MV-SWB despite INT default; distinct purple/black visual treatment + DO NOT OPERATE overlay. SVG content rendered inline; PDF/PNG rendering deferred to calc.render_label. Europower Systems AG qualified-person attestation + QR-code links to safety database.

sections.title: Input Ingestion
sections.summary: arc-flash intent consumed from intl-11kv-substation example. 3 nodes selected for labelling.

decisions.label: RESTRICTED override for MV-SWB
decisions.summary: IE 47.2 cal/cm² > 40 cal/cm² threshold → restricted_format auto-applied

sections.title: Signal-Word Distribution
sections.summary: 2 DANGER (MSB-1 Cat 3, DB-L1 Cat 3) + 1 RESTRICTED (MV-SWB IE 47.2).

decisions.label: DANGER for Cat 3
decisions.summary: PPE Category 3 → DANGER signal word per NFPA 70E mapping

decisions.label: RESTRICTED for IE > 40
decisions.summary: Incident energy 47.2 cal/cm² exceeds NFPA 70E Category 4 upper bound → RESTRICTED signal word

sections.title: Content Population
sections.summary: MSB-1 + DB-L1: All NFPA 70E §130.5(H) required fields populated. MV-SWB: RESTRICTED fields populated; ppe_category null; ppe_clothing_description advises de-energisation + LOTO.

sections.title: RESTRICTED Equipment
sections.summary: 1 RESTRICTED triggered (MV-SWB IE 47.2 cal/cm² > 40 cal/cm² threshold).

sections.title: Rendering Status
sections.summary: SVG inline for 3 labels (distinct RESTRICTED template for MV-SWB). PDF + PNG + project-index PDF pending calc.render_label.

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions
sections.summary: Compliant. No non-compliance flags. 4 assumptions logged.

sections.title: Project Label Index
sections.summary: 3 labels total. 2 ISO-7010 + 1 RESTRICTED. 2 DANGER + 1 RESTRICTED. All QR codes linked to safety database.
